title: The Absolute Beginners Guide to Cyber Security - Part 4
description:
This course features Coursera Coach!

A smarter way to learn with interactive, real-time conversations that help you test your knowledge, challenge assumptions, and deepen your understanding as you progress through the course.

In this course, you will dive into the core aspects of cybersecurity that are essential to protecting yourself online. From understanding internet privacy tools to safeguarding your personal data, you will gain crucial skills to prevent cyber threats and protect your information. You will explore browser security, VPNs, password management, and how to protect yourself against fraud, phishing, and hacking attempts. Learn about social media and email security, including how to secure your Facebook, LinkedIn, and Twitter accounts. Additionally, the course provides an in-depth look at mobile security, including managing app permissions and identifying legitimate apps.

The course follows a clear and structured flow, beginning with personal cybersecurity practices that you can implement immediately. The journey then takes you through securing your internet browsing, social media accounts, and mobile devices, covering a wide array of practical skills to keep your digital life safe. The final section helps you understand what to do if you have been hacked, ensuring you're equipped to respond effectively.

This course is perfect for anyone looking to develop fundamental cybersecurity knowledge. Whether you are a beginner or someone wanting to secure your online presence, this course offers step-by-step guidance. No prior technical experience is required, but a basic understanding of digital tools will be helpful.

By the end of the course, you will be able to secure your personal and online data effectively, navigate social media securely, manage your passwords, use VPNs, and ensure the safety of your mobile devices.
